title: Luminis
description: This is a small resource pack, which aims to replace all GUI textures for a futuristic feel.
body:
# Modern and Star Ocean inspired UI
Transform your Minecraft experience with this sleek, futuristic GUI resource pack! Designed with simplicity and style in mind, this pack replaces the standard GUI textures with a cool, modern design inspired by futuristic technology with fantasy elements. Some textures are currently missing and will be added one after another.

**Most of the art is done by the wonderful Geastre**

### Made for 1.20.2+
  It's possible that this pack also works for earlier versions, but they aren't tested and supported.


### Mod support for:
- [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Better Armor Hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterarmorhud)
- [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar)
- [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) / OptiFine
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)

### Legal:

Please do not steal/modify textures unless for personal uses only! Do not create downloads for this on your own! Always link back to this site due to it being the original location. Resource Pack and details belong to Nexyte
